title: Continuous Same Amount Orders
description: Find customers who have at least three consecutive orders with the same amount.
sql_solution: WITH t AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY date) - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id, amount ORDER BY date) grp FROM orders) SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM t GROUP BY customer_id, amount, grp HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

customer_window = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(to_date(col("date")))
amount_window = Window.partitionBy("customer_id", "amount").orderBy(to_date(col("date")))

grouped_orders = orders.withColumn(
    "grp",
    row_number().over(customer_window) - row_number().over(amount_window)
)

result = (
    grouped_orders.groupBy("customer_id", "amount", "grp")
    .agg(count(lit(1)).alias("sequence_length"))
    .filter(col("sequence_length") >= 3)
    .select("customer_id")
    .distinct()
)
